hassium.config.screen.title: Hassium Config
hassium.config.screen.hint: Open the config via Mod Menu, or edit config/hassium/hassium-client.toml and config/hassium/hassium-common.toml
hassium.configuration.title: %s Configuration
hassium.configuration.clientCache.enable: Local Region hits reduce repeat chunk transfers. Default: true.
hassium.configuration.clientCache.maxAge: Unused entries may be cleaned after this many days. Default: 30.
hassium.configuration.clientCache.hotSco: Below this score, chunks are cold and preferred for eviction. Default: 0.3.
hassium.configuration.clientCache.recenc: Used with frequency weight for hotness. Default: 0.7.
hassium.configuration.clientCache.target: 0 = auto (maxSizeMb×0.8). Cleanup shrinks toward this target.
hassium.configuration.clientCache.bloomF: Prefilter to skip useless .mca reads. Default: true.
hassium.configuration.clientCache.viewDi: When client RD > server view-distance, fill the ring with local cache (render only). Depends on clientCache.enabled. Mutually exclusive with Bobby. Default: true.
hassium.configuration.clientCache.maxRen: Beyond-view / effective RD cap (fog/memory). Vanilla slider max is 32. RD>32 needs manual options.txt edit. Default: 32.
hassium.configuration.clientCache.ovdUnl: Delay before unloading chunks that left the beyond-view ring (avoids thrash on fast movement). 0 = synchronous. Default: 5.
hassium.configuration.clientCache.sectio: When the local cache hash mismatches the server, request only changed 16×16×16 sections and merge into the cache instead of a full chunk. Requires client cache. Default: on.
hassium.configuration.clientNetwork.ligh: Strip LightData from packets; client recomputes lighting. Disable if lighting looks wrong. Default: true.
hassium.configuration.clientNetwork.maxC: Hard cap when applying cached chunks; time budget is the main limiter. Default: 32.
Hard cap for main-thread async callbacks. Default: 32.
hassium.configuration.clientNetwork.main: Per-frame time budget for applying chunks. Default: 10; may rise during join JoinBoost.
hassium.configuration.clientCache.joinBo: Briefly raises main-thread budget after join to speed up loading. Default: true.
hassium.configuration.clientCache.entity: Capture non-player entities when a chunk unloads for later world export. Stored separately from chunk cache regions. Default: off.
hassium.configuration.storage.enabled.to: [High risk] type 126 / ZSTD+dictionary. Changes chunk payload format — back up worlds first. Default: true.
hassium.configuration.storage.mode.toolt: mirror, readonly_vanilla, or hassium_only. Default: mirror.
hassium.configuration.network.enabled.to: chunkHash / hassium:* push. Disable to fall back to vanilla chunk packets. Default: true. Reconnect/restart recommended after change.
hassium.configuration.network.maxChunksP: Per player per server tick. Default: 10; server-side only.
hassium.configuration.network.globalPack: [High risk] Replace vanilla Zlib with ZSTD. May conflict with similar compressors/Via. Default: true. Restart recommended.
hassium.configuration.network.globalComp: Packets smaller than this are not compressed. Default: 256.
hassium.configuration.network.compressio: Packet IDs or namespace prefixes. Add third-party channels if aggregation slows them. See docs/mod-compat.md.
hassium.configuration.network.enablePack: [High risk / compat escape] Disable if it conflicts with third-party custom channels. Default: true.
hassium.configuration.network.enableComp: Mostly for aggregated packets. Default: true.
hassium.configuration.network.serverChun: Baseline when dynamic pool is off. Default: 8; server-side only.
hassium.configuration.network.metricsEna: Traffic, cache hits, etc. Default: true.
hassium.configuration.network.dynamicThr: Scale threads by queue load. Default: true; server-side only.
hassium.configuration.compat.requireClie: When false (default), vanilla clients can join and use vanilla packets.
hassium.configuration.compat.autoDowngra: Fall back to vanilla behavior on errors. Default: true.
hassium.configuration.debug.metadataLogg: chunkHash receive/compare/apply. Debug only. Default: false.
hassium.configuration.debug.dispatcherLo: Main-thread callback queue. Debug only. Default: false.
hassium.command.export.singleplayer_erro: Cannot export cache from singleplayer world, please specify a server IP
hassium.command.export.server_not_found: Cache directory not found for server %s
hassium.command.export.no_connection: Not connected to server, cannot export current world
